manufacturing_locations: United States (Sunnyvale, California; Peachtree Corners, Georgia)
supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on sole- and single-sourced suppliers for components; majority of instruments and accessories manufactured in Mexicali, Mexico
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain constraints for engineered raw materials; subcontract suppliers operationally challenged; elevated material and labor prices; potential insolvency of suppliers due to elevated interest rates; cybersecurity threats; proposed 25% tariff on imports from Mexico; difficulties obtaining sufficient supply of materials

regulatory_risks: FDA clearance and approval requirements for new products and indications
Compliance with FDA Quality System Regulation (QSR) and Quality Management System Regulation (QMSR)
EU Medical Devices Regulation (MDR) compliance and certification requirements
Medical device reporting regulations for adverse events
Recalls and field corrective actions
China NMPA regulatory approvals and quota system for surgical robots
Provincial limits in China on hospital charges for robotic surgeries
Japan MHLW approval and reimbursement processes
Healthcare reform legislation impacting reimbursement (ACA, Medicare, Medicaid)
Federal Anti-Kickback Statute and False Claims Act compliance
HIPAA privacy and security requirements
Physician Payments Sunshine Act reporting
State anti-kickback and false claims laws
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and UK Bribery Act compliance
Antitrust and competition laws (US and EU)
GDPR and data privacy regulations (EU, UK, US states including CCPA)
China data compliance regime (Cybersecurity Law, Data Security Law, PIPL)
EU AI Act and automated decision-making regulations
Conflict minerals disclosure requirements (Dodd-Frank)
RoHS and WEEE Directives (EU)
Export controls and trade restrictions
Clinical trial and IDE regulations
Notified body designation delays in EU
Brexit-related regulatory changes (MHRA, UKCA marking)
Swiss tax law changes
OECD BEPS and global minimum tax (Pillar Two)
Product liability and negligence claims
Intellectual property litigation risks
FDA Warning Letters and enforcement actions

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions due to Ukraine conflict
Potential sanctions on China impacting business operations
Export controls on technology to certain countries
US-China trade tensions and potential tariffs
Proposed 25% tariff on imports from Mexico
Entity List restrictions on exports to China
Currency control measures and restrictions in Russia
